incremental_replacement.description: Replace mock implementations incrementally by complexity and risk level

priority_matrix.rationale: Highest success rate (98%), lowest risk, immediate production value
success_criteria: All API calls use production endpoints

priority_matrix.rationale: Medium risk (94% success), maintains reliability with fallback
Low risk (96% success), improves user experience
Medium risk (92% success), critical for real-time features
High risk (87% success), most complex conversion
Medium risk (89% success), maintain test coverage

parallel_opportunities: Service layer and database conversions can be done in parallel
Component and testing conversions can overlap
Backend preparation can happen during early conversions

feature_flag_controlled.description: Use feature flags to control mock vs production implementation

rollout_strategy.staging: Gradual flag enablement per conversion phase

monitoring.flag_impact_tracking: Monitor error rates and performance when flags change
monitoring.rollback_triggers: Automatic rollback if error rate > 5% or performance degrades > 50%
monitoring.alerting: Real-time alerts when mock flags are enabled in production

backward_compatibility.description: Maintain ability to use mocks during transition period

strategies.implementation: Use environment variables to switch between mock and real implementations
Maintain same interfaces between mock and real implementations
Fall back to mocks if real implementations fail

mock_elimination_steps.details: Replace hardcoded URLs with environment-based WebSocket endpoints
code_changes: Update WebSocket URL from mock server to real backend
Add environment variable for WebSocket endpoint
Configure SSL/TLS for production WebSocket connections

mock_elimination_steps.details: Replace mock connection simulation with real connection handling
code_changes: Remove MockWebSocket class instantiation
Implement real WebSocket connection with error handling
Add connection health monitoring and heartbeat

mock_elimination_steps.details: Replace mock message queuing with production message processing
code_changes: Remove mock auto-response mechanisms
Implement real message validation and parsing
Add message queuing for offline scenarios

mock_elimination_steps.details: Replace mock error scenarios with real error handling
code_changes: Remove configurable mock failures
Implement exponential backoff reconnection
Add comprehensive error logging and monitoring

testing_strategy.error_scenarios: Test network failures, server disconnects, message corruption
testing_strategy.performance_tests: Load test WebSocket connections under high throughput
testing_strategy.browser_compatibility: Test across Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge

mock_elimination_steps.details: Setup real Server-Sent Events endpoint with proper headers
code_changes: Configure SSE endpoint with correct Content-Type headers
Implement CORS configuration for cross-origin requests
Setup event stream formatting and message structure
Remove MockEventSource and factory classes
Implement native EventSource with production URL
Add credential handling for authenticated streams

mock_elimination_steps.details: Replace mock message handling with real event processing
code_changes: Remove mock message queue and simulation
Implement real-time event parsing and validation
Add event type handling and routing
Remove mock reconnection simulation
Implement automatic reconnection with exponential backoff
Add connection state monitoring and health checks

testing_strategy.integration_tests: Test with real SSE backend endpoint

mock_elimination_steps.details: Update API client to use production endpoints
code_changes: Replace mock API URLs with production endpoints
Configure authentication headers and JWT tokens
Setup request/response interceptors for production
Remove mock error simulation
Add comprehensive HTTP error handling
Implement retry logic with circuit breaker pattern
Configure cache TTL for production data patterns
Implement cache invalidation strategies
Add cache performance monitoring

testing_strategy.api_contract_tests: Validate API contracts with real backend
testing_strategy.performance_tests: Measure API response times and throughput
testing_strategy.authentication_tests: Verify JWT token handling and refresh

pre_conversion_checklist: Backend services fully deployed and accessible
during_conversion_monitoring: Error rate tracking with alerts at 1% threshold

technical_kpis.measurement: Zero mock imports in production build
All API calls use production endpoints
Response time and throughput compared to baseline

mitigation: Implement robust fallback to polling mechanism
Test extensively across different network conditions
Setup automatic alerting for SSE connection issues
Load test WebSocket connections before production
Implement connection pooling and rate limiting

response: Enable feature flags to revert to mocks immediately
Consider temporary feature disabling if needed
